data.name: Company has an approved Asset Management Policy
data.description: This test checks whether your company has an approved [Asset Management Policy](/policies/asset-management-policy-bsi).
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Asset Management Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Asset%20Management%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Asset Management Policy for your company.
